ns0:entry.ns0:title: CherryHQ/cherry-studio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CherryHQ/cherry-studio
Language: typescript
AI productivity studio with smart chat, autonomous agents, and 300+ assistants. Unified access to frontier LLMs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: YishenTu/claudian
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/YishenTu/claudian
Language: typescript
An Obsidian plugin that embeds Claude Code as an AI collaborator in your vault

ns0:entry.ns0:title: farion1231/cc-switch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/farion1231/cc-switch
Language: typescript
A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant tool for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode & Gemini CLI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hcengineering/platform
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hcengineering/platform
Language: typescript
Huly — All-in-One Project Management Platform (alternative to Linear, Jira, Slack, Notion, Motion)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iOfficeAI/AionUi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iOfficeAI/AionUi
Language: typescript
Free, local, open-source 24/7 Cowork app and OpenClaw for Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Qwen Code, Goose CLI, Auggie, and more | 🌟 Star if you like it!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lobehub/lobehub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lobehub/lobehub
Language: typescript
The ultimate space for work and life — to find, build, and collaborate with agent teammates that grow with you. We are taking agent harness to the next level — enabling multi-agent collaboration, effortless agent team design, and introducing agents as the unit of work interaction.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mnfst/manifest
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mnfst/manifest
Language: typescript
Smart LLM routing for OpenClaw. Cut Costs up to 70%

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moeru-ai/airi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi
Language: typescript
💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openclaw/openclaw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw
Language: typescript
Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/ruflo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/ruflo
Language: typescript
🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features enterprise-grade architecture, distributed swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: superset-sh/superset
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/superset-sh/superset
Language: typescript
IDE for the AI Agents Era - Run an army of Claude Code, Codex, etc. on your machine
